title: Teams Archive - Green & Spiegel
content:
## At Green & Spiegel we know that our people are our strength.
We strive to recruit, train and retain the very best talent in order to deliver​ the very best immigration services to our valued clients. People are at the centre of everything we do, and we are proud that many of our staff members have been lifelong employees of Green and Spiegel.
